title: Being Mitsuko
overview: Two sisters live in the suburbs of Tokyo and one of them is having an affair with her boss. The other sister is then stalked. The sisters try to live their lives and be content, but after their father's affair their mother committed suicide and their feelings are unsettled. The sister who is stalked hates men, but ironically happens to work at a job where she is expected to flirt with men.
